env._NOTE_RETRY_TUNING: Bulk re-embed retry tuning: raised pending cap (default 1000 parks excess pending rows as failed) + faster batch/interval than the default 5-per-5min drain.
env._NOTE_SOCKET: macOS sun_path limit (104 chars): the default bridge socket path under database/daemon-ipc.sock exceeds the limit and the launcher fails with EINVAL. Pin to a short /tmp path so the multi-client bridge can bind.
env._NOTE_1_DB: Default DB (recommended): context-index__ollama__nomic-embed-text-v1.5__768.sqlite (auto-derived from provider+model+dim). Pull `ollama pull nomic-embed-text:v1.5` for the local-first new-user setup; hf-local with nomic-ai/nomic-embed-text-v1.5 is the Python-side fallback.
env._NOTE_2_TOOLS: Registers 35 tools: memory_save/search/context/match_triggers/index_scan/stats/health/validate/update/delete/bulk_delete/list/drift_why/retention_sweep/get_learning_history/quick_search (16 memory), memory_causal_link/stats (2 causal), memory_ingest_start/status/cancel (3 async ingest), embedder_list/set/status (3 embedder), session_bootstrap/resume/health (3 session), checkpoint_create/delete/list/restore (4 checkpoint), task_preflight/postflight (2 task), eval_run_ablation/reporting_dashboard (2 eval). MCP namespace: mcp__mk_spec_memory__*
env._NOTE_3_PROVIDERS: Auto cascade (ADR-014, local-first): Ollama (local) -> hf-local (Python sentence-transformers) -> OpenAI API -> Voyage API.
env._NOTE_4_EMBEDDINGS_PROVIDER: Auto cascade (ADR-014, local-first): Ollama -> hf-local -> OpenAI -> Voyage. Set EMBEDDINGS_PROVIDER=<provider> (ollama|hf-local|openai|voyage) to force a specific tier.
env._NOTE_5_CLOUD_PROVIDERS: Cloud tiers are explicit opt-in: add VOYAGE_API_KEY or OPENAI_API_KEY only when you want cloud embeddings; otherwise the cascade keeps everything local.
env._NOTE_8_FEATURE_FLAGS: Opt-out flags (default ON): SPECKIT_ADAPTIVE_FUSION, SPECKIT_SESSION_BOOST, SPECKIT_CAUSAL_BOOST, SPECKIT_HYDE_ACTIVE, SPECKIT_ENTITY_LINKING, SPECKIT_GRAPH_CONCEPT_ROUTING, SPECKIT_GRAPH_REFRESH_MODE=write_local. Tier 3 LLM save routing is always on (fail-open to Tier 2 on timeout).
env._NOTE_RECOMMENDED_SETUP: New users: install Ollama (https://ollama.com) and run `ollama pull nomic-embed-text:v1.5`. The cascade auto-detects Ollama and persists nomic-embed-text-v1.5 (768d) as the active embedder — no API keys, all-local.

env._NOTE_1_TOOLS: Registers 9 tools (8 public + 1 internal trusted-caller): advisor_recommend/rebuild/status/validate plus skill_graph_scan/query/status/validate/propagate_enhances. MCP namespace: mcp__mk_skill_advisor__*

env._NOTE_1_DB: Database lives at .opencode/.spec-kit/code-graph/database/code-graph.sqlite by default; SPECKIT_CODE_GRAPH_DB_DIR overrides.
env._NOTE_2_TOOLS: Registers 8 tools: code_graph_scan/query/classify_query_intent/context/status/verify/apply, detect_changes. MCP namespace: mcp__mk_code_index__*
env._NOTE_3_INDEX_DEFAULTS: INDEX_* committed defaults are false (end-user safe). Maintainer mode: set SPECKIT_CODE_GRAPH_MAINTAINER_MODE=true in .env.local (gitignored); the launcher will force all 5 INDEX_* to true at startup. Per-call code_graph_scan args (includeSkills, includeAgents, includeCommands, includeSpecs, includePlugins) still override env for fine-grained control.
